evidence.page_title: Video: Crocodile bites off a trainer's arm in the middle of a show
evidence.title: Video: Crocodile bites off a trainer's arm in the middle of a show | Daily Mail Online
evidence.description: Crocodile bites off a trainer's arm in the middle of a show in northern Thailand. The 45-year-old trainer was performing a stunt at the Phokkathara zoo in Chiang Rai. The reptile chomps down and violently shakes it from side to side.
evidence.text:
TOP VIDEOS
Crocodile bites off a trainer's arm in the middle of a show in northern Thailand. The 45-year-old trainer was performing a stunt at the Phokkathara zoo in Chiang Rai. The reptile chomps down and violently shakes it from side to side.

evidence.page_title: The terrifying moment a crocodile bites a trainer's hand - Newsflare
evidence.title: The terrifying moment a crocodile bites a trainer's hand
evidence.description: This is the terrifying moment a crocodile bites a trainer's hand - then does a DEATH ROLL. The man was entertaining tourists by teasing the killer beast and putting his arm inside its mouth at a show in Phuket, Thailand. But the hungry reptile snapped its deadly jaws shut - then did a terrifying death roll to try and subdue its victim. Incredibly, the quick-thinking trainer escaped any serious injuries by rolling in the same direction as the croc which then released its grip.

The terrifying moment a crocodile bites a trainer's hand
This is the terrifying moment a crocodile bites a trainer's hand - then does a DEATH ROLL. The man was entertaining tourists by teasing the killer beast and putting his arm inside its mouth at a show in Phuket, Thailand. But the hungry reptile snapped its deadly jaws shut - then did a terrifying death roll to try and subdue its victim. Incredibly, the quick-thinking trainer escaped any serious injuries by rolling in the same direction as the croc which then released its grip.

evidence.page_title: Video: Man inserts an arm in crocodile's jaws and promptly gets bitten
evidence.title: Watch: Man inserts an arm in crocodile’s jaws (why?) and promptly gets bitten
evidence.description: At a zoo in Thailand, a crocodile attacked the trainer in front of an audience, leaving them terrified.
evidence.text:
Watch: Man inserts an arm in crocodile’s jaws (why?) and promptly gets bitten
At a zoo in Thailand, a crocodile attacked the trainer in front of an audience, leaving them terrified.
Phokkathara Zoo in Northern Thailand experienced a terrifying incident when one of its reptile-handlers tried to perform a trick for the audience. He was trying to put his arms into a crocodile’s mouth for the benefit of the audience, but the crocodile wouldn’t have it and clamped his teeth on him.
The footage was shared by Khun Phusawait, who was visiting the zoo with his family. Dong Wittawat, the owner of the animal park, said, “’The performer is fine. His name is Tao and he is 45. The crocodile does not have a name.”
To everyone’s relief, Wittawat added, “He was was treated at the farm with bandaging. He loves crocodiles and he will be working again soon in the next two weeks. It is very rare for this to happen.’’
